name: Wild Rice-Cucumber Salad
recipeIngredient: 3 Cucumbers, sliced into thick rounds and cut into quarters
1 Green onion (or 1 Vidalia or red onion), chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring the water to a boil. Add the wild rice and return to boil. Reduce heat to simmer for 40 minutes or until some of the grains burst. Remove from heat and let cool.
2. Drain any excess water. Toss the cooled rice with cucumbers, red bell pepper, and chopped green onion in a bowl.
3. You may use any dressing you like. Two options are:
- Basil/Balsamic Vinegar Dressing: Combine 1/3 cup balsamic vinegar, 2 tablespoons soy sauce, 2 tablespoons water, 2 tablespoons fresh basil (chopped fine), 2 cloves garlic (chopped fine), and 1 teaspoon black pepper in a jar. Shake well and let sit overnight.
- Savory Salad Dressing: Combine 1 tablespoon Dijon mustard, 1/4 cup red wine vinegar, 1/4 cup water, 1/4 cup soy sauce, and a dash of Tobasco sauce in a jar. Let sit for a few hours before serving.
The salad will taste better if it is dressed several hours before eating.
